query:
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.displayName,
  p.totalPoints AS storedBasePoints,
  COALESCE(SUM(b.points_awarded), 0) AS boostPoints,
  p.totalPoints + COALESCE(SUM(b.points_awarded), 0) AS canonicalLeaderboardTotal,
  COUNT(b.id) AS boostWinCount
FROM participants p
LEFT JOIN boost_wins b ON b.user_id = p.userId
GROUP BY p.id, p.displayName, p.totalPoints
HAVING boostPoints > 0
ORDER BY canonicalLeaderboardTotal DESC
LIMIT 20;
